programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1980s. The life of bullied teenage Niall (Mitchell Robertson) turns upside down when the son of his mother's partner, the fierce and unpredictable Ruben (Stuart Campbell), comes to live with them for a while.Even though they are not related by blood, over time they both become inseparable.However, subsequent events make them move away from each other.Three decades later, Ruben (Richard Gadd) shows up uninvited at Niall's (Jamie Bell) wedding.It soon becomes clear why he reconnected with his long-lost brother.A suggestive story about the fragility of male relationships, brotherhood, betrayal, loyalty and violence.

programme.title: This is the end
programme.desc: A series of paranormal events take place in Los Angeles, reminiscent of the end of the world.As a result of the chaos in the city, a group of friends are trapped in an apartment.Unfortunately, their situation is becoming more and more dramatic by the minute: they are running out of food and free space, which gives rise to conflicts.Finally, having no other choice, they decide to leave the apartment and face the chaos outside.The wacky comedy is the directorial debut of two comedians: Seth Rogen and Evan Goldberg.In addition to brilliant humor, the film is full of fierce irony directed at American celebrities.The main roles were played by: James Franco ("Citizen Milk", "127 Hours"), Jonah Hill ("Moneyball", "The Wolf of Wall Street"), Danny McBride ("Divine Chillout", the series "It Could Be Worse"), Emma Watson ("Harry Potter") and singer Rihanna.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The ninja turtles defeated their eternal enemy Shredder and each of them found a different job.Michaelangelo makes money at children's parties as a mascot.Donatello works as a telephone operator, and Leonardo exercises his character in solitude.Only Raphael remained faithful to his old ideals and fights hooligans at night.Meanwhile, Master Splinter begins to see signs of impending danger.Immortal entrepreneur, Maximilian J. Winters decides to take control of New York, and later the entire world.To do this, he summons his four stone generals and tries to open the gate to another dimension.Only a team of Teenage Mutant Turtles can stop him.

programme.title: Esperando a Dalí
programme.desc: Barcelona, ​​1974, a period of intense opposition to Franco's dictatorship.Brothers Fernando (Ivan Massagué), a chef, and Alberto (Pol López), an activist, must hide from the authorities.They find shelter in Cadaqués, a picturesque seaside village that is also the home of the famous artist Salvador Dalí (Gal Soler).In this setting, the brothers meet Lola (Clara Ponsot), who helps them find work.Fernando, influenced by Dalí's works and his infatuation with women, finds a passion for creating unique dishes.The man's ambitions grow, especially when Jules (José Garcia), Lola's eccentric father, dreams of organizing a dinner for Dalí himself.Despite the difficulties, Fernando creates a culinary masterpiece that inspires a revolution in the world of taste, which leads to the creation of the famous Surreal restaurant.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas Tail
programme.desc: Riley runs a shelter for homeless animals.Fate puts in her path... a prince.

programme.title: Ballers 5
programme.desc: Spencer Strasmore, although his career as an American football star has already ended, still leads an exciting life.Now his job is to help people trying to make it in the world of sports.

programme.title: Ballers 5
programme.desc: Spencer Strasmore, although his career as an American football star has already ended, still leads an exciting life.Now his job is to help people trying to make it in the world of sports.

programme.title: The Goldsmith's Secret
programme.desc: 1999. Goldsmith Juan Pablo travels from Spain to New York for an exhibition of his works.On the way he passes through his hometown.He will meet Celia, a great love who changed his life.

programme.title: Wolfgang (extraordinari)
programme.desc: After the sudden death of his mother, nine-year-old Wolfgang (Jordi Catalán), an exceptionally gifted boy with features on the autism spectrum, is forced to live with his father, Carles (Miki Esparbé), whom he has never met before.An orderly nine-year-old who strives for perfection cannot stand his father's chaotic lifestyle.He wants to escape to Paris to study at the Grimald Academy and become the best pianist in the world.When Carles discovers his plan, he must make the most important decision in his life: follow his dream of an acting career or sacrifice his plans and become the father Wolfgang really needs.

programme.title: Four Letters of Love
programme.desc: Ireland.Margaret (Helena Bonham Carter) and Muiris (Gabriel Byrne) Gore have two children, Sean (Dónal Finn) and Isabel (Ann Skelly).The family's happiness is disturbed by the unexpected illness of their son.On another part of the island lives William Coughlan (Pierce Brosnan), who quit his job and left his loved ones to follow his dreams of being a painter.The fates of two families intertwine thanks to the Gore's daughter and the son of an unfulfilled artist, Nicholas (Fionn O'Shea).It turns out that young people are made for each other, even though they know nothing about each other.Destiny and the desire for love push them towards each other.Adaptation of the book of the same title by Niall Williams.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Police officers Sonny Crockett and Ricardo Tubbs are assigned to a dangerous mission.They are busting a gang of drug smugglers, led by a man named Montoya.The trafficker is believed to be involved in the murder of two federal agents and the family of their informant.Crockett and Tubbs infiltrate the Montoi organization.Sonny begins an affair with Isabella, who invests the proceeds of crime in legal ventures.Crockett tries to protect his lover, having no idea what the woman actually does and what her true identity is.Meanwhile, Tubbs and his girlfriend, analyst Trudy Joplin, try to understand the activities of criminals using their own methods.Ricardo does not know that he is putting his beloved in danger.Wanting to reach the gang leader, two detectives decide to transport a load of drugs to southern Florida.Gradually, the lines between the rules of the underworld and the rule of law are blurring.

programme.title: The Knick
programme.desc: New York, the first years of the 20th century.Brilliant surgeon Dr. John Thackery (Clive Owen) leads a brave team of young medics at Knickerbocker Hospital.The doctor introduces pioneering medical solutions while struggling with cocaine addiction.His team is making breakthroughs in medicine at a time when antibiotics do not yet exist and patient mortality is terrifyingly high.The group of distinguished medical staff includes, among others:protégé Everett Gallinger (Eric Johnson) and Algernon Edwards (Andre Holland), a promising surgeon from Europe who was included in the team against Thackery's wishes.The series is directed by Oscar winner Steven Soderbergh.

credits.actor: Dr. John W. Thackery - Clive Owen

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programme.title: Comeback 3
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programme.title: Battle After Another
programme.desc: Pat (Leonardo DiCaprio) hides under a changed name as Bob Ferguson with his daughter Willa in a town in the desert.No one knows that in the past, this inconspicuous man was the leader of a group of revolutionaries that committed numerous acts of sabotage: his accomplices freed refugees, robbed banks and blew up government buildings.Sixteen years after the attack on the prison, the leader of the elusive gang is tracked down by his old enemy, Colonel Steven Lockjaw (Sean Penn), who was obsessed with Bob's beloved, Willy's mother.When the girl is kidnapped, her desperate father asks her former mentor (Benicio Del Toro) for help.Together they set off to search for the hostage.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programme.title: Comeback 3
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Police officers Sonny Crockett and Ricardo Tubbs are assigned to a dangerous mission.They are busting a gang of drug smugglers, led by a man named Montoya.The trafficker is believed to be involved in the murder of two federal agents and the family of their informant.Crockett and Tubbs infiltrate the Montoi organization.Sonny begins an affair with Isabella, who invests the proceeds of crime in legal ventures.Crockett tries to protect his lover, having no idea what the woman actually does and what her true identity is.Meanwhile, Tubbs and his girlfriend, analyst Trudy Joplin, try to understand the activities of criminals using their own methods.Ricardo does not know that he is putting his beloved in danger.Wanting to reach the gang leader, two detectives decide to transport a load of drugs to southern Florida.Gradually, the lines between the rules of the underworld and the rule of law are blurring.

programme.title: Gaga Chromatica Ball
programme.desc: The performance of the famous singer Lady Gaga recorded in 2022 at Dodger Stadium in Los Angeles.The concert, which was part of The Chromatica Ball's tour promoting its sixth album, took place in front of an audience of 52,000.The singer performed, among others:their greatest hits, such as "Stupid Love", "Bad Romance", "Just Dance", "Poker Face", "Shallow", and "Rain On Me".The whole is complemented by songs played on the piano, amazing choreography, spectacular pyrotechnics and the artist's spectacular stylings.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set 23
programme.desc: The program takes viewers behind the scenes of film production.In each episode, the creators discuss three cinema hits.They show how spectacular effects, impressive sets and acting performances are created.

programme.title: El bus de la vida
programme.desc: Music teacher Andrés (Dani Rovira) lives in the Basque Country.He is soon diagnosed with cancer, which forces him to often visit the hospital in Bilbao.To get to the facility for treatment, he regularly uses an old bus driven by Mai (Susana Abaitua), who transports him and other cancer patients free of charge.Thanks to conversations with other passengers, the teacher manages to control his fear and look to the future with hope.

programme.title: Ballers 5
programme.desc: Spencer Strasmore, although his career as an American football star has already ended, still leads an exciting life.Now his job is to help people trying to make it in the world of sports.

programme.title: Ballers 5
programme.desc: Spencer Strasmore, although his career as an American football star has already ended, still leads an exciting life.Now his job is to help people trying to make it in the world of sports.

programme.title: Four Letters of Love
programme.desc: Ireland.Margaret (Helena Bonham Carter) and Muiris (Gabriel Byrne) Gore have two children, Sean (Dónal Finn) and Isabel (Ann Skelly).The family's happiness is disturbed by the unexpected illness of their son.On another part of the island lives William Coughlan (Pierce Brosnan), who quit his job and left his loved ones to follow his dreams of being a painter.The fates of two families intertwine thanks to the Gore's daughter and the son of an unfulfilled artist, Nicholas (Fionn O'Shea).It turns out that young people are made for each other, even though they know nothing about each other.Destiny and the desire for love push them towards each other.Adaptation of the book of the same title by Niall Williams.

programme.title: BlacKkKlansman
programme.desc: Early 1970s, Colorado Springs, Colorado.Ron Stallworth (John David Washington) becomes the first black police officer in the department.After encountering manifestations of racism, he asks to be transferred to undercover work.He decides to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan, but for this he will need the help of an older, white colleague - Flip Zimmerman (Adam Driver).Ron calls representatives of a racist militia on the phone, and Flip meets with them directly.The police obtain information about the Klan's planned attack.Ron contacts David Duke (Topher Grace), the Grand Wizard of the Ku Klux Klan, by phone.Soon, Flip is accepted into the organization.Spike Lee's film won an Oscar for best adapted screenplay in 2019.Starring: versatile supporting actor Adam Driver ("What's Up, Davis?", "Silence") and former American football player John David Washington, Denzel Washington's son, nominated for a Golden Globe for this role.

credits.actor: Master Patrolman Andy Landers - Frederick Weller

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programme.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programme.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programme.title: The Last Vermeer
programme.desc: The Netherlands after World War II.The accountability of Nazi criminals and their accomplices continues.A Jew, Joseph Piller (Claes Bang), who fought in the resistance movement, is to deal with the case of stolen works of art.He accuses the eccentric painter Han van Meegeren (Guy Pearce) of collaboration, who hosted Germans at his hedonistic parties and sold them valuable paintings.The artist faces a death sentence.However, he claims that he traded in fakes he created.His exquisitely crafted fakes are indistinguishable from the originals.Although the evidence points to van Meegeren's guilt, and accepting his version would make the brilliant forger a national hero, Piller begins to believe him.Together with her assistant (Vicky Krieps), she tries to prove his innocence, putting her career and good name at stake.Based on facts, the extraordinary story of a Dutch painter and one of the best art forgers in history.It was based on the biography of Han van Meegeren by Jonathan Lopez.

programme.title: You're Cordially Invited
programme.desc: A booking error causes two weddings to take place in one place at the same time.Both families face the challenge of having to share space.However, they have no intention of letting anything stop them from organizing a special ceremony for their loved one.Jim (Will Ferrell), the father of Jenni (Geraldine Viswanathan), who is getting ready to marry, and Margot (Reese Witherspoon), sister of the second bride, Neve (Meredith Hagner), try to keep their cool in a difficult situation, but they are still fighting a desperate duel.A comedy directed by Nicholas Stoller, the creator of "Neighbors".

programme.title: The Knick
programme.desc: New York, the first years of the 20th century.Brilliant surgeon Dr. John Thackery (Clive Owen) leads a brave team of young medics at Knickerbocker Hospital.The doctor introduces pioneering medical solutions while struggling with cocaine addiction.His team is making breakthroughs in medicine at a time when antibiotics do not yet exist and patient mortality is terrifyingly high.The group of distinguished medical staff includes, among others:protégé Everett Gallinger (Eric Johnson) and Algernon Edwards (Andre Holland), a promising surgeon from Europe who was included in the team against Thackery's wishes.The series is directed by Oscar winner Steven Soderbergh.

credits.actor: Dr. John W. Thackery - Clive Owen
